title: Issue Schema
description: Structured validation, pilot, production, or sustaining issue used for triage, ownership routing, recovery planning, and readiness assessment.

issue_id.description: Unique issue identifier, such as ISSUE-001.

milestone.description: Milestone where the issue was discovered or where it has impact.

is_gating.description: Whether the issue blocks milestone exit, production readiness, RFD, RTS, or customer qualification.

reported_by.description: Team or function that reported the issue.

related_requirements.description: Requirement IDs related to this issue.

reproducible.description: Whether the issue can be reproduced.

machine_available.description: Whether the debug owner has access to the required machine or test environment.

recommended_action.description: AI or human recommended next action.

confidence_score.description: AI confidence score for severity classification, owner routing, or recovery recommendation.
